title: Client survey of recent CUAET applicants - Canada.ca
content:
## Client survey of recent CUAET applicants
Ottawa, April 14, 2022— Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) has invited some clients who recently applied for the Canada-Ukraine authorization for emergency travel (CUAET) to participate in a survey.
By collecting these survey responses, IRCC will have a better understanding of CUAET applicants’ future plans in Canada in order to support improvements to program delivery.
Completing the survey is voluntary. Participation will be kept confidential. All data collected is for research purposes only. What you tell us about your experience won’t affect any past, current or future applications with IRCC.
The survey can be completed in English, French, Ukrainian or Russian.
If you don’t get an invitation to take the survey, we welcome your input and encourage you to share your feedback on the form available on our website .
About the invitation to take the survey
- The email will be sent from immigration.refugees.and.citizenship.canada.immigration.refugies.et.citoyennete.canada@notification.canada.ca
- The link to the survey will start with ircc.qualtrics.com
- The email won’t have any attachments.
